scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n api,web,subweb,admin -c blue,green,cyan,bgBlue "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm run dev:web" "pnpm run dev:sub:web" "pnpm run dev:sub:admin"
scripts.install:all: pnpm install --dir nest-server && pnpm install --dir next-host && pnpm run install:subapps
scripts.install:subapps: pnpm install --dir qiankun-subapps/app-web && pnpm install --dir qiankun-subapps/app-admin
scripts.db:migrate: pnpm --dir nest-server exec prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.build:subapps: pnpm run build:sub:web && pnpm run build:sub:admin
scripts.dev:admin:standalone: concurrently -k -n api,admin -c blue,bgBlue "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm --dir qiankun-subapps/app-admin run dev:standalone"
scripts.dev:web:standalone: concurrently -k -n api,subweb -c blue,cyan "pnpm run dev:api" "pnpm --dir qiankun-subapps/app-web run dev:standalone"
scripts.build:web: pnpm run build:subapps && pnpm --dir next-host run build
